zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie是Guillaume II de Tancarville和Théophanie de Penthièvre的兒子，於大約1150年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾。他於大約1170年與Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年7月24日在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德布文斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie是Guillaume II de Tancarville和Théophanie de Penthièvre的儿子，于大约1150年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾。他于大约1170年与Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年7月24日在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德布文斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie was born about 1150, in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France as the son of Guillaume II de Tancarville and Théophanie de Penthièvre. He married Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville about 1170. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 24 July 1214, in Bouvines, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie est né environ 1150, à Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, fils de Guillaume II de Tancarville et Théophanie de Penthièvre. Il a épousé Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1214, à Bouvines, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie wurde um 1150 in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Guillaume II de Tancarville und Théophanie de Penthièvre geboren. Er hat um 1170 Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juli 1214 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bouvines, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie è nato il circa 1150 nel Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia come figlio di Guillaume II de Tancarville e Théophanie de Penthièvre. Lui sposato Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 luglio 1214, nel Bouvines, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandieは約1150年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメタンカーヴィルでGuillaume II de TancarvilleとThéophanie de Penthièvreの息子として生まれた。約1170年にDame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年7月24日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードボウヴィンスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie(은)는 대략 1150년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 탠카빌에서 Guillaume II de Tancarville(와)과 Théophanie de Penthièvre의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1170년 Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 7월 24일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 부빈스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França filho de Guillaume II de Tancarville e Théophanie de Penthièvre. Ele casou-se com Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1214, em Bouvines, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie родился около 1150 г. в местности танкарвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Guillaume II de Tancarville и Théophanie de Penthièvre. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville около 1170 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 июля 1214 г. в местности боуваинесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de TANCARVILLE Chamberlain de Normandie nació aproximadamente 1150, en Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia como hijo de Guillaume II de Tancarville y Théophanie de Penthièvre. Se casó con Dame Aelis de MEULAN Damme de Tancaeville aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de julio de 1214, en Bouvines, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
